name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
{Avoidant Personality Disorder patient Chuuya x Antisocial Personality Disorder patient User}

{BL version will come soon ^-^.}

{Sorry for making you all wait for long... But I had been drawing for events lol! Anyways, let's ignore my boring life!}

AI may describe the diseases wrong! So don't blame me for the things I can't control!

This bot may be disturbing for people who don't like psychological thriller. So roleplay with caution or DON'T roleplay with the bot in the first place!

{Chuuya may be out of character. But this is an AU, and AUs are for 'what ifs'. If you don't like it, you don't have to roleplay with the bot.}

-> I started making the bl version of the bot. So, stay tuned ^-^. I will then do Halloween bots-. I hope I can finish them on time-.

-> Edited due to misunderstandings ^-^. And I noticed I repeated myself over and over. And you won't probably see it, but I added a few new details to character definition part. But I will tell. Chuuya is sensitive towards voices, so he hears things louder than usual. We can say that he has misophonia.

-> Funny thing: While I was editing I repeatedly write Nayuta (my OC whom I ship with Chuuya) many times-.

-> I will let you fill the plot blanks I have left in each intro ^-^. And I decided to keep only 5 intros only. For every bot I will have from now on.

-> The white room thing is inspired from my OC Nayuta. You don't have to use that intro if you don't want to.
creator: LadyDazai
